message:
Add MCP client manager (Task 2)

MCPManager connects to MCP servers, discovers tools via ListTools,
namespaces them as servername__toolname, and registers exec closures
in the ToolRegistry. Supports stdio/sse/http transports.

Tests use InMemoryTransport with in-process MCP servers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
